title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'username@example.com' into the 'Username' field | Enter 'password123' into the 'Password' field | Click on the 'LOG IN' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and redirected to the main app screen

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'invalidusername@example.com' into the 'Username' field | Enter 'wrongpassword123' into the 'Password' field | Click on the 'LOG IN' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials

title: Login with empty fields
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'Username' field | Click on the 'Password' field | Click on the 'LOG IN' button
expected_result: Error messages are displayed indicating required fields are empty

title: Login with special characters in password
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'username@example.com' into the 'Username' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd!' into the 'Password' field | Click on the 'LOG IN' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and redirected to the main app screen
